scope: ACL 2027 supplement page 24 GRScenes zoom-stress table companion v3 visual iteration

motivation.target_page_before: page 24 remained one of the lowest-density non-reference pages after the v2 zoom-stress companion
motivation.goal_alignment: Use more registered render material and a new imagegen AI slot while reducing sparse lower-page whitespace and preserving the claim boundary.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where any channel is below 245, used for the sparse-page raster audit
measurement.red_test_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide for the zoom material-shift GRScenes VLM stress table
claim_boundary.notes: The AI-generated zoom-stress gate is not a VLM prediction, benchmark row, material-preservation result, or additional experiment. Evidence-bearing panels remain registered original/noMDL render pairs and the frozen table.

zoom_stress_gate.role: AI-generated table-reading schematic only; deterministic figure code draws labels, bullets, and claim-boundary text.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v3 figure has four registered top render-pair cards, a separated v3 AI zoom-stress gate card, and a tall registered zoom-level audit strip. The rejected red-heavy zoom-019/cup/faucet tiles were removed; the selected version has no visible red-material fallback panels.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 24 keeps Table S6, the larger v3 companion, caption, and boundary paragraph together. Page 25 begins the material-effects section normally. The page is denser and the figure/caption do not collide.

layout_iterations.result: Rejected after visual review because zoom-019, cup-view-B, and faucet stress tiles introduced large red surfaces and failed the red-test heuristic at 0.0151022727.

Selected: four clean registered render-pair cards plus a tall stacked audit strip using backpack, clock, bottle, cup, and a lower-red picture pair. Page 24 active245 density increased to 0.201200788 at 90 dpi.

tests.result: RED before implementation for missing registered zoom-level audit strip and v3 source/slot set; GREEN after selected v3 implementation: 2 passed in 1.16s
completed; pages 23-25 regenerated for local visual review
completed; pages 23-25 regenerated for density comparison against the pre-v3 audit
normalized required caption text present; local-path and forbidden stronger-claim tokens absent
exit 0; no whitespace errors in the tracked diff

tests.command: direct trailing-whitespace scan over the new docs, JSON, manifest, LaTeX, generator, source registry, and layout test files
tests.result: no trailing whitespace and all scanned text files end with a final newline

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched in this run.
